notes: v242 — Two display fixes. From the 13th of each month the header clock could show 'AEST NaN:NaN:NaN' and the ASX-Open light stopped changing — a date-reading quirk now fixed for good: correct Sydney time all month, on every device. On phones the top bar was getting squeezed, letting the Simple/Advanced tabs sit over the clock and language picker — the header now grows to fit on small screens. Plus a tiny tidy-up: no more empty grey pill next to the Simple card titles until there's a real count to show.
